# ConaiSoft

> Software & AI engineering partner. We help founders and product teams ship web platforms, mobile apps, and AI features with senior architecture, weekly deliverables, and 100% code ownership.

## Site
- Home (ES): https://conaisoft.com/es
- Home (EN): https://conaisoft.com/en
- Blog (ES): https://conaisoft.com/es/blog
- Blog (EN): https://conaisoft.com/en/blog
- Custom software: https://conaisoft.com/crea-tu-software
- AI automation workshop: https://conaisoft.com/automatiza-ia
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/mackewinsson/exploring-call

## Blog topics (for buyers who hire development)
- Agency delays vs weekly sprint partners
- Hire in-house vs outsource
- Freelancer risk checklist
- Questions to ask a software vendor
- When no-code is no longer enough

## What we build
- Full-stack web & SaaS (Next.js, React, TypeScript)
- AI agents, RAG pipelines, and document intelligence
- React Native mobile apps (iOS / Android)
- Cloud infrastructure & DevOps (AWS, GCP, Vercel)

## How we work
- Discovery & architecture first
- Weekly sprint deliverables with working software
- Testing, CI/CD, and documentation included
- Full repository and credential handover — no lock-in

## Contact
- Prefer a short discovery call over cold email
- Calendly: https://calendly.com/mackewinsson/exploring-call
- Languages: Spanish and English
